lecture_topic: Corrosion fundamentals: role of oxygen and moisture in metal corrosion
primary_cases: Boston warehouse fire protection system (leaking closed system, 10-20 year clogged arteries)
GE 304 stainless steel reactor safe-end stress corrosion cracking (late 1970s)
Arizona warehouse galvanized hangers (40-80 mils/year corrosion from trapped condensation)
primary_concepts: Free oxygen as necessary condition for corrosion
Wet-dry cycling acceleration of carbon steel corrosion
Chloride-oxygen synergy in stainless steel pitting
